criteria.criterion: A selected Codex Desktop project with matching Desktop session history renders matching session cards instead of 0 visible.
Matching tolerates equivalent Windows path spellings where safe, including slash direction and case differences.
criteria.evidence: apps/miniapp/src/index.test.ts regression: codex project view matches equivalent Windows project paths

criteria.criterion: Selected-project views still exclude unrelated or unscoped Desktop sessions.
Selected-project views still render at most 5 session cards.
The empty state remains available when there are truly no matching sessions.
criteria.evidence: Existing Mini App renderSessionCards path unchanged

criteria.criterion: Regression tests cover the path normalization mismatch and the strict unrelated-session exclusion.
Raw validation output is saved under raw/.
